ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(AND(OR($Profile.Name='CFG - Distressed Collection',$Profile.Name='CFG-Distressed ParaLegal Only') , OR( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info required') ,ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Approved'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Rejected')) ) ,AND(TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Approved', OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Rejected'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info Required'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Ready for review'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'In Progress'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'New'))),
AND(TEXT(PRIORVALUE( Status__c)) = 'Rejected', OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Approved'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'More Info Required'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Ready for review'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'In Progress'),ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'New') )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't update record whenever the status is Approved/Rejected.
